title: panax major
intro: Panax major, also known as Dong Quai or Chinese Angelica, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It is a perennial plant native to China, used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and estrogenic effects. The health benefits of Panax major include improving circulation, reducing menstrual cramps, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, as well as possessing antioxidant and anti-aging properties. Panax major is commonly prepared as a decoction, capsule, or tea, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance its therapeutic effects.
